caption: A person's hands are shown manipulating a clear plastic card protector on a black surface. In the background, several boxes are stacked, and a small inset video in the lower right corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap. The logo "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" is prominently displayed in orange and white text across the center of the scene, and a smaller logo stating "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" appears on the right. As the sequence progresses, the hands carefully slide a white card into the top of the plastic protector. The person's fingers grip the edges of the plastic sleeve, gradually pushing the card further down into the holder. The background remains static, and the man in the inset video continues to observe the process, while the focus remains on the precise action of inserting the card.
